purpose: Tracks the competitor-driven enhancement loop (every 30m). One tool per iteration, rotating. Tax/paycheck calculator is OUT OF SCOPE.

history.shipped: Optional logo upload (PNG/JPG) — client-side FileReader, shown in live preview and embedded in the PDF header via jsPDF addImage. Competitor parity (logo/branding was the most common feature we lacked).

invoice-generator: Accent/brand color picker (SmoothLedger) — recolor PDF headings + totals rule
Shipping cost line (Flowlu) — separate from tax/discount in totals
Save/restore invoice to localStorage so a refresh doesn't lose work
